pi_items.source: Task description + Nuxeo path naming conventions verified against other tasks (Annual-Report-2023, Public-Reports show space→hyphen conversion)
Task description line explicitly states 'Title: Department Publications'
Task description specifies 'Description: Central publication area organized by department' — contains both keywords
Task description specifies 'Title: Engineering' as first child section
Task description specifies Engineering description as 'Published technical documents, specifications, and architecture reviews' — all keywords present
Task description specifies 'Title: Marketing' as second child section
Task description specifies Marketing description as 'Published marketing collateral, campaign reports, and brand guidelines' — all keywords present
Task description specifies 'Title: Legal' as third child section
Task description specifies Legal description as 'Published contracts, compliance documents, and regulatory filings' — all keywords present

privileged_info_summary: Task requires creating a hierarchical Section structure in Nuxeo Platform (a document management system that uses Section as a core content type for publishing). The parent section will be titled 'Department Publications' with description emphasizing 'publication' and 'department' organization, located at /default-domain/sections/Department-Publications. Three child sections will be created: Engineering (containing technical specifications and architecture), Marketing (with marketing campaign and brand content), and Legal (with contracts, compliance, and regulatory documentation). All metadata keyword claims are verified against the task description requirements.
